scripts.vapid:generate:
node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const webpush=require('web-push'); const path='.env'; const existing=fs.existsSync(path)?fs.readFileSync(path,'utf8'):''; const keys=webpush.generateVAPIDKeys(); const cleaned=existing.split('
').filter((line)=>!line.startsWith('VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY=')&&!line.startsWith('VAPID_PRIVATE_KEY=')&&!line.startsWith('VAPID_SUBJECT=')).join('
').trimEnd(); const next=(cleaned?cleaned+'
':'')+`VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY=${keys.publicKey}
VAPID_PRIVATE_KEY=${keys.privateKey}
VAPID_SUBJECT=mailto:admin@example.com
`; fs.writeFileSync(path,next); console.log('VAPID keys generated in .env');"
